name: Leek & Goat Cheese Tart
recipeIngredient: 6 medium Leeks (white and 2 inches of green)
-- and rinsed well to remove grit
recipeInstructions:
1. In a lidded frying pan, sauté the leeks in the butter until wilted.
2. Add vinegar, salt, and pepper; cover and cook on low heat until leeks are tender (about 30 minutes).
3. Remove lid and increase heat to moderately high.
4. Add cream and cook, stirring, until cream is absorbed (about 1 minute).
5. Remove pan from heat and let cool slightly.
6. Spread goat cheese evenly over the bottom of the tart shell.
7. Spoon leek mixture evenly over the cheese.
8. Bake in a 350 degree F. oven until heated through and browned on top (about 15 minutes).
